expectations.text: New JSON params defined including crawl space height, vent width, vent height, and vent spacing fields
expectations.evidence: crawlSpaceHeight, ventWidth, ventHeight, ventSpacing, ventBottomOffset all defined in JSON block

expectations.text: draw_box called for each wall segment between vent cutouts (not one monolithic box)
expectations.evidence: solid sub-intervals iterated, draw_box called for each; above/below vent drawn separately

expectations.text: subtract_intervals used to compute wall segments with vent openings removed
expectations.evidence: subtract_intervals.call() used with vent_positions mapped to intervals

expectations.text: Vent vertical position: 4 inches above bottom of stem wall (z_off + 4), not at top or bottom
expectations.evidence: vent_bottom_offset: 4 present and used in below-vent / above-vent geometry split

expectations.text: apply_bim_data called with 'Footing' type and Concrete material for BIM attribution
expectations.evidence: apply_bim_data.call(entities, 'CrawlSpace') — uses 'CrawlSpace' not 'Footing'; IFC IfcFooting not explicitly stated in BIM section

expectations.text: Foundation height calculation updated: crawl space height contributes to the Z offset used by walls above
expectations.evidence: Geometry rules section states crawlSpaceHeight contributes to Z offset for floor system above
